description: Transforming the sandal boot style with a classic stiletto heel, this pair gives off a ethnic vibe. Channel this traditional styling into a boho-ethnic wardrobe or opt for the classic, timeless Indian diva look. Heel: 3" Upper Wide midfoot strap with embroidery and sequin details Synthetic braided thong toe separator Padded footbed with embossed branding Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured design on the heel for added comfort shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
